transcript: That can't teach you how to be me Now you see me, now you don't I'm a magician You are limited, I am a limited edition They don't even make them like me anymore I'm so flashy, I don't even say cheese anymore I don't just want it, I just want more Man, I'm a major key in this game And these keys open doors, I'm a big move Yeah, I'm a big move You can't name a lot of things that I didn't do Stack of paper like a book, not a kindle You outbid it, I'm the one they getting into And I don't break a sweat Let's get it, let's get it Let's get it
